name: @snowluma/runtime
description: SnowLuma runtime distribution manifest: ships into dist/ (launcher.bat, package.json, native/*.dll, native/*.node). vite-plugin-cp copies this package.json into dist/, then the release workflow runs `npm install --omit=dev` inside dist/ to materialize the production node_modules. Dependencies listed here are the runtime-only externals that vite did NOT bundle into index.mjs (currently: better-sqlite3 — native binding, can't be inlined).
